headline: NextEra and Dominion Are About to Become the World's Largest Electric Utility. Here's What Investors Should Do Next.
summary: With a combined enterprise value of $240 billion, this giant utility merger allows NextEra to expand beyond Florida.

raw.headline: NextEra and Dominion Are About to Become the World's Largest Electric Utility. Here's What Investors Should Do Next.
raw.summary: With a combined enterprise value of $240 billion, this giant utility merger allows NextEra to expand beyond Florida.

headline: NextEra + Dominion: Great Future, But Way Too Early To Buy
summary: NextEra Energy is acquiring Dominion Energy in an all-stock deal, creating a utility powerhouse with over 80% regulated business. Read more on NEE stock here.
